summary: A clip of footage from the U.S. Senate floor. A man in a dark suit and red tie stands at a lectern speaking, the rows of wooden desks empty behind him. To his side is a large posterboard with white and red text reading REPUBLICAN PLAN: $140 Billion more for ICE & Border Patrol, Zero Dollars to Lower Costs.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit speaks at a lectern on the Senate floor beside a posterboard reading REPUBLICAN PLAN.
Wider view of the empty chamber desks with the speaker and the posterboard visible.
The speaker continues at the lectern, the REPUBLICAN PLAN board still displayed.

notable_text: REPUBLICAN PLAN: $140 Billion more for ICE & Border Patrol; Zero Dollars to Lower Costs
